title: Dusk & Divinity 2: The Second Coming
description: A Sequel To A Mod Inspired By Doctor4t
body:
This mod just got a whole lot crazier. Thank me for that, I had a lot of fun while making it for y’all. It’s still based on Charter, but it has a lot of cool, destructive weapons, that are (hopefully) unique.

 



 

This mod expands on my previous mod, Dusk and Divinity, with all new weapons and items, as well as some other, progression based things, so you can get these weapons in survival!

 

 

If you’ve ever wanted to be a god, or had epic fantasies about destroying your enemies, this mod is for you. You can raze towers and villages alike, all the way to the ground. You can kill bosses with only a slap on the face. You can become like that of an enlightened justice bringer, the Messiah of Minecraft.

 



 

 

All new weapons are added in this mod, compatible and craftable with the materials of the previous mod. Let’s go over them and their powers.

 

 

Tabernacle: block, used for giving offerings, any item, giving absorption if given a random item, if given a sword or any other weapon, it will give a sacrificial knife instead.

 

Sacrificial Knife: item, if right clicked, it will stab you, dealing the damage of the weapon, and shoot a small blood blade that deals a low amount of damage in exchange for a small amount of health.

 

Divine Vastissima: item, big Morning Star-like weapon with the ability to on right click summon a temporary obsidian (or magical) block where the player is looking, to create walls or platforms.

 

Verglas Eye: item, used on right click to trap enemy(s) around in ice or powdered snow and give them a frosted effect, also stopping burning.

 

Deus Jade: item, big sword, on death of enemy it summons a block that looks like a ghostly green version of the sword, that when the main big sword is right clicked, it explodes all ghost swords around you.

 

Frigus Gemina: item, Deus Jade but stronger, combined with Verglas Eye, on death of enemy, it summons a dark blue version of the sword that when you right click on the main big sword, explodes all dark blue swords around you, which freezes all enemies.

 

Greater Divinity/Shattered Greater Divinity: item, similar to the lesser divinity in design (lesser divinity fyi is a funny crossbow looking thing that shoots you up in the air and shatters after too many uses), but bigger and more complex. On right click it shoots a massive beam of godly light, exploding and destroying almost everything in sight. The broken variant will teleport you to the nearest Mob nearby, and explode, killing the mob and making some head room for the player.

 

Spine Scythe: item, scythe, made of spine bones. When right clicked, it will summon a withering blood blade that flies in the direction of the nearest enemy.

 

Tricontinuum Sai: item, sai that on right click teleports you to a chosen dimension, automatically freeing some space for you if teleported into the nether, If teleported to overworld, you get the same as the nether, and teleports you to spawn if you teleport to the end. 

 

Yin/Yang: item, Yin’s ability is that you shoot a beam of damaging light when you right click the sword and are at full health, slowly damaging you, but ripping into your enemy health faster than a pot of water boils over lava, and also when you hit an enemy it heals you a small amount. Yang’s ability is to give more levels of strength the closer you are to dying, starting at half health.

 



An all new block, with some interesting features. 

 

The GUI has a red slot, for a new material gotten through killing innocent mobs, or breaking netherrack, called abhorrence essence. This can be used in the tabernacle, or you can craft four of them into an abhorrence stone, which can be used in some of the weapon crafting recipes.

 

If you put in the essence, then an item into the bottom slot, the item will slowly transform into either a different item, or into some absorption; and the essence will be used up. If you are reading this and not just skimming, put a music disc in the bottom slot for a nice surprise.

 





 

The new armor set, called Abhorrence Armor, is a powerful new armor made from Abhorrence stones. The armor has some special abilities when worn too.

 

Abhorrence Collar: If you are elytra flying, you will no longer take damage from falling or swooping downward too fast. It also will smoke bomb when you sneak, allowing for a getaway very easily.

 

Abhorrence Breastpiece: If you are in light level 10 or above, it will give you good effects relating to sunlight, and if you are in light level 10 or below, it will give you good effects relating to the dark.

 

Abhorrence Waistrobe: If you sneak and sprint at the same time, it will teleport you where you are looking.

 

Abhorrence Heels: If you are sprinting, it will give you some brief speed and jump boost, as well as increase your step height to one.

 

 

The Previous Mod:

https://mcreator.net/modification/112629/dusk-divinity

 

I Recommend Using JEI And Better Combat With This Mod, It Improves The Experience And Accessibility.
